name: 12_system_a_fails_return_above_hwm
description: Branch 3 / System A: safe_hwm crosses arm-cross but current_return is ABOVE safe_hwm (no profit-protection trigger). vwap_ticks reset.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 3.0 >= cross 2.0 TRUE, but current_return 4.0 < safe_hwm 3.0 is FALSE -> condition fails -> vwap_ticks reset to 0. is_vwap_broken False. System B: current_return 4.0 <= bleed_arm -1.0 FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset. Returns (0, 0, False, False).
